Given the undirected dynamic graph with the edges:
[(3, 6, 0), (4, 9, 0), (2, 4, 1), (3, 5, 1), (5, 8, 1), (6, 9, 1), (1, 7, 4), (2, 3, 5), (2, 7, 8), (4, 7, 8), (0, 7, 9), (2, 6, 9), (3, 7, 10), (4, 6, 10), (0, 9, 11), (5, 9, 12), (1, 9, 13), (5, 7, 13), (4, 8, 14), (0, 5, 17), (1, 6, 17), (6, 7, 17), (0, 2, 18), (0, 8, 19), (2, 8, 19), (3, 9, 19), (1, 5, 21), (2, 9, 21), (4, 5, 21), (0, 4, 24), (1, 4, 26), (6, 8, 26), (2, 5, 29)].

Start at node 8 at time 0.

Look for an edge connected to 8 at or after time 0.
